steps:
1. Launch the app and navigate to Home. 
2. Tap Collage Maker. 
3. Verify Allow Sprocket to access photos and videos on this device popup appears. 
4. Verify Allow limited access, Allow all, and Don't allow options are displayed. 
5. Tap Allow all.
cases.expected: Gallery permission is granted and the Collage screen opens.

verifications.expected: Gallery permission is granted and the Collage screen opens.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps:
1. Open Collage Maker. 
2. Allow gallery permission. 
3. Verify Back icon.
 4. Verify Select 2 to 4 Photos title. 
5. Verify Next button is disabled. 
6. Verify four collage placeholders.
 7. Verify first placeholder is highlighted in green. 
8. Verify Recent folder dropdown. 
9. Verify gallery images and right-side scrollbar.
cases.expected: All default UI elements are displayed correctly.

verifications.expected: All default UI elements are displayed correctly.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps: 1. Open Collage screen. 2. Tap Recent folder. 3. Scroll folder list. 4. Select another folder. 5. Verify gallery refreshes with selected folder images.
cases.expected: Selected folder images are displayed successfully.

verifications.expected: Selected folder images are displayed successfully.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps: 1. Open Collage screen. 2. Select the first image. 3. Verify green badge 1 appears. 4. Verify second collage slot is automatically selected. 5. Select the second image. 6. Verify Next button is enabled.
cases.expected: Two images are selected and Next button becomes active.

verifications.expected: Two images are selected and Next button becomes active.

steps: 1. Open Collage screen. 2. Select the same gallery image for all four collage slots.
cases.expected: Same image can be selected multiple times.

verifications.expected: Same image can be selected multiple times.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps:
1. Select four images. 
2. Tap any selected image again. 
3. Verify image is deselected and placeholder becomes empty.

verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps:
1. Select 2–4 images. 
2. Tap Next. 
3. Verify Back icon.
 4. Verify Drag & Drop to Reorder title. 
5. Verify Next button.
 6. Verify collage preview. 7. Verify Edit icon on each image
 8. Verify layout options below the collage.
cases.expected: Drag & Drop screen displays all UI elements correctly.

verifications.expected: Drag & Drop screen displays all UI elements correctly.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps: 1. Open Drag & Drop screen. 2. Verify first layout is selected by default. 3. Tap each available layout. 4. Verify collage layout changes accordingly.

verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps: 1. Open Drag & Drop screen. 2. Press and hold any image. 3. Drag the image to another collage position. 4. Drop the image.

steps:
1. Open Drag & Drop screen.
 2. Tap the Edit icon on any image. 
3. Verify Edit screen opens. 
4. Tap Back to return.
cases.expected: Selected image opens in Edit mode successfully.

verifications.expected: Selected image opens in Edit mode successfully.

cases.description: Verify system behavior when image cannot be loaded.
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow.
5. Tap Printer and connect printer successfully.
6. Select an unsupported or corrupted image from Gallery.
8. Attempt to open the Edit screen.
cases.expected: Appropriate error message is displayed and the image editor is not opened.

verifications.description: Verify system behavior when image cannot be loaded.
verifications.expected: Appropriate error message is displayed and the image editor is not opened.
